published.title: Cloudflare Content Independence Day 2026: AI Bot Rules
published.description: Cloudflare marks one year of Content Independence Day. AI bots now drive 52% of crawler traffic. What it means for writers and tool builders.
published.heat_source: Daily briefing 2026-07-06 ⭐ SEO/Cloudflare item: 'Cloudflare Content Independence Day 一年回顾' (published July 1, 2026). Sister-site pivot logic didn't trigger (no threadgrab-priority topic duplicated); this is a fresh md2rich-adjacent news-analysis angle. 52% of crawler traffic now AI training, Monetization Gateway + Pay-Per-Use launched, Block AI Bots default-on for new domains. Perfect alignment with md2rich's client-side, no-upload, privacy-first positioning — the rendering step that keeps content out of every server is the natural complement to Block AI Bots at the network edge.
